common.deselectHint: Deselecting will hide suggestions, statistics, and per-song scores from the song list.
common.enterUsername: Enter a username to search for.
common.serviceDown: The service may be down unexpectedly. Please refresh to try again.

songs.title: Songs
songs.noResultsSubtitle: Try adjusting your search or filters.

player.title: Statistics
player.noPlayerSubtitle: Search for a player to view their statistics.
player.switchProfileConfirm: Switch to {{name}} as your tracked profile?
player.instrumentStatsDesc: A quick look at {{name}}'s overall Festival statistics per instrument.
player.topSongsPerInstrumentDesc: {{name}}'s highest and lowest-ranked competitive songs per instrument, sorted by percentile.
player.topSongsDesc: {{name}}'s top ranked competitive songs on {{instrument}}, sorted by percentile.
player.bottomSongsDesc: {{name}}'s lowest-ranked competitive songs on {{instrument}}, sorted by percentile.
player.switchConfirmMessage: In order to see {{name}}'s scores, you will have to set them as your selected profile. Would you like to continue?

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.noSuggestionsSubtitle: Select a player profile to get personalized suggestions.
suggestions.noSuggestionsFiltered: Try changing your filters to see more suggestions.
suggestions.serviceDown: The service may be down unexpectedly. Please refresh to try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appSettingsHint: General Festival Score Tracker app settings.
settings.showInstrumentIconsDesc: Display instrument icons on each song row showing which parts have leaderboard scores or FCs.
settings.enableVisualOrder: Enable Independent Song Row Visual Order
settings.enableVisualOrderDesc: When enabled, the metadata display order on song rows is controlled separately from sort priority. When disabled, metadata follows sort priority order.
settings.songRowVisualOrderHint: Drag to reorder metadata items on song rows.
settings.filterInvalidScoresDesc: Hide song scores that exceed the mathematical maximum by more than the leeway percentage.
settings.filterInvalidScoresToggleDesc: When enabled, the app will attempt to filter out invalid leaderboard values based on the maximum score derived from the CHOpt path.
settings.maxScoreLeewayDesc: This slider controls a percentage value that allows for some expanded range of scores to still be valid. For example, a CHOpt path with a max score of 100k and {{leeway}}% leeway will allow the app to accept scores up to {{maxScore}} as “valid”.
settings.songRowVisualOrderDesc: When filtering to a single instrument in the song list, extra metadata is displayed. Choose the order it appears in on the bottom row.
settings.showInstrumentsHint: Choose which instruments to display throughout the app.
settings.showMetadataHint: When filtering songs down to one instrument in the song list, extra metadata for that song can appear. Choose what you'd like to see in the song row here.
settings.resetDescription: Restore all settings to their default values.
settings.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to their default values?
settings.versionHint: Festival Score Tracker information to help with debugging.

history.title: Score History
history.noHistoryForInstrument: No score history for this instrument
history.selectPlayer: Select a player to view score history

chart.selectBarHint: Select a bar to see more score details.

sort.modeHint: Choose which property to sort by.
sort.resetHint: Restore sort mode and direction to their defaults.
sort.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to discard your sort changes?
sort.metadataPriorityHint: When two songs have the same value for the selected sort mode, lower-priority items are used as tiebreakers.
sort.instrumentOrderHint: Instruments are checked in this order when determining which score to sort by.
sort.filteredInstrumentHint: Filtering to a single instrument unlocks additional sort options for that instrument.
sort.title: Title

filter.resetHint: Restore all filter options to their defaults.
filter.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to discard your filter changes?
filter.globalTogglesHint: Toggles that impact all instruments globally.
filter.instrumentFiltersHint: Select an instrument to filter its scores and FCs.
filter.seasonHint: Filter by the season a score was achieved.
filter.percentileHint: Show or hide songs based on percentile tier.
filter.intensityHint: Filter by the song's difficulty level.
filter.missingScoresDesc: Songs missing scores on all visible instruments.
filter.hasScoresDesc: Songs with scores on all visible instruments.
filter.missingFCsDesc: Songs missing FCs on all visible instruments.
filter.hasFCsDesc: Songs with FCs on all visible instruments.

suggestionsFilter.resetHint: Restore all suggestion filter options to their defaults.
suggestionsFilter.instrumentsHint: Choose which instruments appear in suggestions.
suggestionsFilter.instrumentSpecificHint: Select an instrument to filter suggestions.
suggestionsFilter.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to discard your suggestion filter changes?

songList.title: Song List
songList.description: Browse and search the entire Festival library. Tap a song to see leaderboards and more details.

sort.title: Sort Songs
sort.description: Tap the sort button to reorder by default song data. Select a player profile to narrow it down even more.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Use the sidebar or bottom tabs to switch between Songs, Suggestions, Statistics, and Settings.
navigation.descriptionMobile: Use the bottom tabs to navigate the app. Select a player profile to see even more options.
navigation.descriptionDesktop: Use the sidebar to navigate the app. Select a player profile to see even more options.

filter.title: Filter Songs
filter.description: Filter down the song list by global data, and refine it with per-instrument filters.

songIcons.title: Instrument Icons
songIcons.description: When showing all instruments, quickly identify songs you've FC'd (gold), played (green), or haven't played (red).

metadata.title: Song Metadata
metadata.description: When filtering to a single instrument, see more details about your best score. Customize the order, and what appears, in Settings.

shop.title: Item Shop Highlights
shop.description: Songs currently available in the Item Shop are highlighted with a pulsing glow so you can spot them at a glance.

drillDown.title: Drill Into Your Data
drillDown.description: Tap any stat card marked with a chevron to jump to the Songs page with pre-applied filters, instantly showing you all songs for that category.

overview.title: Global Statistics
overview.description: See a player's overall performance at a glance — songs played, full combos, gold stars, accuracy, and best rank. Tap any stat with an indicator to jump to the relevant songs.

instrumentBreakdown.title: Per-Instrument Stats
instrumentBreakdown.description: Scroll down to see detailed stats for each instrument, and tap to immediately be taken to a filtered list of songs for that instrument.

percentiles.title: Percentile Rankings
percentiles.description: See where a player ranks relative to all players. The percentile table breaks down how many scores land in each bracket — from Top 1% to Top 100%.

topSongs.title: Highest and Lowest Rank Breakdown
topSongs.description: Each instrument shows your highest and lowest five songs by percentile rank. Tap any song to see its leaderboard and score history.

overview.title: Personalized Suggestions
overview.description: Get tailored song suggestions based on your scores — find your best improvement opportunities, achievement gaps, and next milestones.

categoryCard.title: Suggestion Cards
categoryCard.description: Each suggestion is a themed card with songs tailored to what you have and haven't played — near FCs, unplayed tracks, percentile pushes, and more.

globalFilter.title: Filter Suggestions
globalFilter.description: Tap the filter button to control which suggestions are visible to you.

instrumentFilter.title: Per-Instrument Filters
instrumentFilter.description: Select an instrument to fine-tune which suggestion types appear for that specific instrument.

infiniteScroll.title: Endless Suggestions
infiniteScroll.description: Scroll down to load an endless rotation of personalized suggestions.

demo.unfcDesc: Play these songs again on Guitar and grab an FC!
demo.pctPushDesc: Replay these Bass songs to jump to the next percentile bracket.
demo.staleDesc: Songs you haven't played on Vocals this season.
demo.nearFcDesc: If you can get gold stars, you can FC it!
demo.unplayedDesc: Songs you haven't played on Drums yet.

settings.showFirstRunHint: Re-visit the first run experience for each page.

chart.title: Score History Chart
chart.description: When you have a player selected, their score history for this song appears at the top — charting accuracy and score over time. Change instruments to see more data!

barSelect.title: Select a Bar for Details
barSelect.description: Tap any bar on the chart to see the details for that score — date, season, score, and accuracy.

viewAll.title: View Player Scores
viewAll.description: Below the chart, the player's top scores are listed for quick reference. If there's more than five, tapping View all scores will take you to the player history page, where you can see all tracked history for that user, score, and instrument.

topScores.title: Top Scores Per Instrument
topScores.description: Each instrument shows the top leaderboard entries for this song. Tap any player to go to their page, or "View full leaderboard" to go to the instrument leaderboard for the selected song.

paths.title: Optimal Paths
paths.descriptionMobile: Tap "View Paths" in the action button to see the optimal score path for any instrument and difficulty.
paths.descriptionDesktop: Tap "View Paths" in the header to see the optimal score path for any instrument and difficulty.

shop.title: Item Shop Link
shop.descriptionMobile: When a song is in the Item Shop, a shop icon appears on the song card. Tap it to go straight to the store.
shop.descriptionDesktop: When a song is in the Item Shop, an Item Shop button appears in the header. Tap it to go straight to the store.

scoreList.title: Score History
scoreList.description: Every tracked score change for this song and instrument is listed here. Your personal best is highlighted so you can spot it at a glance.

sort.title: Sort Scores
sort.descriptionMobile: Tap the sort button in the action menu to reorder by date, score, accuracy, or season — ascending or descending.
sort.descriptionDesktop: Tap the sort button in the header to reorder by date, score, accuracy, or season — ascending or descending.

rivals.title: Rivals
rivals.noPlayer: Track a player to see their rivals.
rivals.noRivals: Not enough data to identify rivals yet.
rivals.noRivalsCombo: No rivals found for this instrument combination.

detail.closestBattlesDesc: Songs where you and your rival are neck and neck.
detail.almostPassedDesc: You're just behind — one good run could flip these.
detail.slippingAwayDesc: They're pulling further ahead on these songs.
detail.barelyWinningDesc: You're just ahead — don't let them catch up.
detail.pullingForwardDesc: You have a solid lead on these songs.
detail.dominatingThemDesc: You're far ahead — these are your strongest matchups.
detail.noSongs: No song data for this rival.
